pi_items.source: Verified from task.json description and export_result.sh SQL query: SELECT ID FROM wp_posts WHERE LOWER(TRIM(post_title)) = LOWER('Classical Sessions EP')
Verified from task.json description ('Create a new Page (not Post)') and export_result.sh SQL query: AND post_type='page'
Verified from task.json description ('Publish the page (do not just save as draft)') and export_result.sh SQL query: AND post_status='publish'
Verified from task.json description requiring an Audio block for each of the 3 tracks provided by setup_task.sh
Verified from task.json description requiring a Details block immediately below each of the 3 Audio blocks

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wordpress_env publish_audio_release_page task by confirming that the requested page title 'Classical Sessions EP', type 'page', status 'publish', and exactly 3 Audio/Details block pairs explicitly match the task description instructions and export_result.sh queries. I also discovered that the task is critically defective for two reasons: First, 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable. Second, the Wikimedia Commons links in 'setup_task.sh' used to download the 3 MP3 files are dead (returning 129-byte '404 Not Found' text files instead of audio files), which WordPress will likely reject upon upload as invalid media.
